title: Fuel Cost Calculator - Trip Gas Cost Estimator
description: Free fuel cost calculator. Estimate the fuel cost of a trip based on distance, fuel efficiency, and gas price.
keywords: fuel cost calculator, gas cost calculator, trip fuel cost, fuel efficiency
intro: Estimate the fuel cost of a trip based on distance, fuel efficiency, and gas price.

faq.a: Fuel cost = (distance / fuel efficiency) × price per unit. For example, a 500-mile trip at 25 mpg with gas at $3/gallon costs $60.
Distance in miles or kilometers, efficiency in mpg, L/100km, or km/L, and price per gallon or per liter.
